meta.description: VHH frameworks based on human IGHV3-23 (L5V, S74A). Table S1 in paper SI has full list; default from repo example below.
meta.paper_supplement: Download Supplementary Information from https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.09.26.678877v1 for Table S1

frameworks.note: Replace * with designed CDR residues; CDR3 length is variable in practice (use <CDR3> in Table S1)

table_s1_instructions: To add more frameworks from the paper: download the Supplementary Information PDF, export Table S1 as CSV/TSV (or paste sequences), then run scripts/fetch_mber_vhh_frameworks.py --table-s1 <path>
